ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organisms" (
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organism */,
  "organism_name" TEXT /* Name of the organism */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of organism */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organism */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the organism */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the organism */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the organism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organism_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organisms_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES organism_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of property */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organism being measured */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property being measured */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to obtain the measurement */,
  "uncertainty" TEXT /* Uncertainty associated with the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_uncertainty FOREIGN KEY ("uncertainty") REFERENCES measurement_uncertainties ("uncertainty_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_organism_id FOREIGN KEY ("organism_id") REFERENCES organisms ("organism_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_method FOREIGN KEY ("method") REFERENCES measurement_methods ("method_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the reference */,
  "publication" TEXT /* Publication details of the reference */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_references" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement */,
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id", "reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the measurement was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the measurement */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_versions_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organism_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_uncertainties" (
  "uncertainty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each uncertainty */,
  "uncertainty_name" TEXT /* Name of the uncertainty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the uncertainty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uncertainty_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the type of organism
Reference to the type of property
Reference to the organism being measured
Reference to the property being measured
Reference to the unit of measurement
Method used to obtain the measurement
Unique identifier for each access event
Reference to the measurement being accessed
Reference to the user accessing the measurement
Date when the measurement was accessed
Time when the measurement was accessed
Reference to the measurement being versioned
Date when the version was created
